prestazioni: Upgrade to a **McLaren Special Operations (MSO) M840T 4.0L V8** hybrid turbo system featuring **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbos with billet compressor wheels, titanium-aluminide turbine wheels, and 1.15 A/R turbine housings, paired with a **custom MSO titanium exhaust manifold** and **Akrapovič Evolution Line Titanium** exhaust system with 80mm carbon-fiber tips, increasing output to **920PS (908hp) at 7,800 RPM and 950Nm (700 lb-ft) at 5,500 RPM** while retaining the stock **M840T’s flat-plane crank** and **dry-sump lubrication**

Installation of a **McLaren Applied Technologies (MAT) ECU reflash** with **Motec M150** standalone integration for real-time lambda, knock, and torque modeling, paired with **NGK 95616 (R847-11) iridium racing spark plugs** and a **Pectel SQ6M** data logger for track telemetry, optimizing ignition timing for **E85 flex-fuel capability** and **12.5:1 compression ratio** retention

Chassis reinforcement via **MSO Carbon-Fiber Monocell II Spider-specific subframe brace** with **AP Racing CP9660-1000** 6-piston front and **CP9661-1000** 4-piston rear calipers, **Brembo HTC64T** high-temperature brake pads, and **Pagid RSL29** racing brake fluid, paired with **Ohlins TTX40 MkII** 3-way adjustable dampers and **Tractive Suspension** hydraulic bump stops for 1.5G lateral load capacity
estetica: Application of **MSO Defined Carbon Series** full-body **dry carbon-fiber weave** with **gloss clear-coat finish**, including **Spider-specific front splitter with active aero Gurney flaps**, **rear diffuser with integrated titanium exhaust outlets**, and **removable hardtop with electrochromic glass** for weight reduction of **42kg (92.6 lbs)**

Installation of **Vorsteiner V-FF 107** forged 21x10.5J front and **22x12.5J rear wheels** in **matt bronze finish**, wrapped in **Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R** 265/30 R21 and 325/25 R22 tires, paired with **HRE Performance Center Lock** adapters and **McLaren MSO titanium wheel nuts** for a **18kg (39.7 lbs) unsprung weight reduction**

Custom **Rocket Bunny V3 Spider-widebody kit** with **carbon-fiber overfenders**, **aluminum honeycomb core side skirts**, and **dual-element rear wing with DRS (Drag Reduction System)**, finished in **MSO Bespoke **‘Liquid Silver’** paint with **PPF (Paint Protection Film) by XPEL Stealth** for UV and debris resistance
